--- layout: default title: How to Restore a Backup File Using SQL Server Studio nav_order: 110 --- {% raw %}

How to Restore a Backup File Using SQL Server Studio

  1. Use SQL Server Management Studio to restore the backup file.

  1. Select the Device option and browse to the file.

  1. Click Add to select the file path.

  1. Browse folders and select the backup file provided.

  1. Make sure that the database DAQC5 is selected for restore and click OK.

You should see a successful result.

  1. Next, run Blade Runner (Testclient.exe). You will need to login as shown using your sa account.
